purposes.description: Write and execute SQL queries for data exploration, time-based analysis, cohort analysis, and funnel analysis against relational databases

primitives.evidence: SKILL.md:50-123 includes CTEs (funnel analysis), window functions (LAG for month-over-month), multi-table JOINs (cohort analysis), and PERCENTILE_CONT (outlier removal)
scripts/query.sh provides a shell wrapper for executing SQL via sqlite3/psql/mysql CLI tools
Agent must write queries and execute them via query.sh, then parse output

purposes.description: Detect and resolve data quality issues including missing values, duplicates, outliers, and inconsistent formats

primitives.evidence: SKILL.md:141-168 shows duplicate detection with GROUP BY/HAVING, null analysis with CASE, and IQR outlier removal with PERCENTILE_CONT
SKILL.md:201-225 uses pandas for drop_duplicates, fillna, to_datetime, groupby.agg
SKILL.md:129-137 data quality issue table requires identifying which cleaning strategy to apply

purposes.description: Load, clean, aggregate, and export CSV/Excel data using pandas operations including filtering, groupby, pivot tables, window functions, and merging

primitives.evidence: SKILL.md:201-246 uses pandas for read_csv, read_excel, groupby, pivot_table, merge, cumsum, pct_change, rolling
Agent must write Python scripts and execute them to process data files
Must read input CSV/Excel files; bundled sample data WA_Fn-UseC_-Telco-Customer-Churn.csv (970KB)

purposes.description: Create charts and visualizations using matplotlib/seaborn (line, bar, heatmap) or ASCII art for terminal output

primitives.evidence: SKILL.md:266-298 uses matplotlib.pyplot and seaborn for line charts, bar charts, heatmaps with savefig
Must execute Python visualization scripts and save output PNG files
Visualization scripts save PNG files to disk via plt.savefig

purposes.description: Generate structured analysis reports in Markdown with executive summary, key metrics, insights, and recommendations

primitives.evidence: SKILL.md:319-363 report template requires multi-section structured text with executive summary, insights, recommendations
Reports include Markdown tables for key metrics with specific column structure
Reports must be written to files in the reports/ directory

purposes.description: Compute descriptive statistics, correlations, and run statistical tests (t-test, chi-square, ANOVA, Pearson) using Python

primitives.evidence: SKILL.md:400-423 uses pandas describe/median/mode/skew/kurtosis and scipy.stats for ttest_ind, chi2_contingency, f_oneway, pearsonr
Agent needs to interpret statistical output (p-values, correlation coefficients) to draw conclusions
Must execute Python scripts to compute statistics

purposes.description: Set up a data analysis workspace with directory structure, templates, and helper scripts via data-init.sh

primitives.evidence: scripts/data-init.sh creates directories with mkdir -p and writes template files via heredocs
Agent runs ./scripts/data-init.sh to initialize workspace

purposes.description: Follow a structured 6-step analysis process: define question, understand data, clean, explore, analyze, communicate

primitives.evidence: SKILL.md:429-458 defines a 6-step sequential analysis process the agent should follow
SKILL.md:429-458 lists numbered steps that must be followed in order

unmatched_requirements: SKILL.md:29-35 references TOOLS.md for data source configuration but no TOOLS.md file exists in the skill
SKILL.md:372-378 references scripts/extract_data.py, scripts/analyze.py, and scripts/format_report.py but none of these files exist in the skill
SKILL.md:507-518 references scripts/analyze.py with --type cohort and --report flags but this file does not exist
SKILL.md:522-538 describes integration with Marketing, Sales, and Business Dev skills but provides no concrete integration mechanism
